steps.action: Review cleanup feature evidence and rerun relevant baseline gates
steps.expected: Dead/duplicate cleanup changes are integrated and do not regress critical behavior
steps.observed: Scrutiny review artifact for dead-code-and-duplicate-cleanup reports PASS with no blocking issues and commit-level confirmation of duplicate-path removals, bean collision fix, and cleanup completion; local gate-fast rerun completed successfully after those changes.

steps.action: Verify no runtime regressions after cleanup in user-facing critical lane
steps.observed: gate-fast executed 394 tests with 0 failures and 0 errors, indicating cleanup work did not break the primary user-surface truth suite.

evidence.output: [gate-fast] OK with BUILD SUCCESS; Tests run: 394, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0.

assertions.title: CI pipeline green on Factory-droid branch

steps.action: Run CI-equivalent gate-fast command from repository scripts
steps.expected: gate-fast passes locally in same lane used by CI for this branch
steps.observed: scripts/gate_fast.sh completed successfully with gate guards and truthsuite execution; final status [gate-fast] OK.

steps.expected: Factory-droid branch uses migration v2 and invokes gate-fast through workflow
steps.observed: .github/workflows/ci.yml sets MIGRATION_SET=v2 and gate-fast job calls bash scripts/gate_fast.sh, matching local validation command.

evidence.output: Gate-fast run summary: Tests run 394, Failures 0, Errors 0, Skipped 0; traceability artifact emitted and gate finished with [gate-fast] OK.
